creator: kbowling@freebsd.org
text:
When booting 10.0-RC1, the systems stops responding with the message:
"pcib5: failed to allocate initial memory window: <address>"
Screencap: http://i.imgur.com/6C8bfnW.jpg

This only happens if SR-IOV is enabled in the BIOS.  This seems to be a regression from 9.1 where I can boot with SR-IOV enabled.

It also only seems to trigger with the X520 add in 10gbe cards (ix driver).  Without those NICs, the system boots with SR-IOV enabled.
